infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The Dental Angel needs camera access so you can take photos of your treatment plans for educational explanations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The Dental Angel needs photo library access so you can upload images of your treatment plans for educational explanations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: The Dental Angel can save images to help you keep track of your dental information.
